judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the execute_python step (var_call_kyFfzRb5NZZNlLwy2ny8UvFv), the agent filtered for "English-language" by searching for the substring "english" in the title/author/categories instead of using the proper language information available in the books_info 'details' field, causing it to miss most true matches and return only one book.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly identifying purchase_ids with 5.0 average ratings and mapping them to books in books_info, the agent filtered for English by looking for the word "English" in categories/author/description without retrieving (or parsing) the 'details' column where language is stored, resulting in only one match ("The Prophet") instead of all qualifying 'Literature & Fiction' English titles (see query_db var_call_he4GeOzFNhdoBfpZPxkmX09E and subsequent execute_python calls).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly identifying perfect-rated purchase_ids (call_Oso652inz4v93cWyxfjHd3oK) and retrieving all 'Literature & Fiction' books (call_zFxxxkTGXAFOYc56yZthRYZB), the agent’s execute_python step used an overly restrictive is_english check that only matched 'written in english' or 'language' tokens in details/description, causing several valid English books to be excluded and yielding only 8 of the 15 ground-truth titles.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly identified 5.0-rated books and merged them with English Literature & Fiction entries (calls call_QjaXnzQrbbWU2T7JqeLQeTpy, call_QKEDYtdCOZBMWlzm5psNpOGv, call_TIvfy1iiC7xuFJ01RfhBINmL) but repeatedly failed to format the output due to execute_python syntax errors and ultimately returned a partial, manually composed list that omitted some correct matches.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After identifying purchase_ids with perfect 5.0 averages (call_00qw0kxF1ZLhCEqxrzdSgm3w), the agent matched books by comparing books_info.title to the review.title field from reviews (call_J444x2RffsDtZmmW2ujIYcEY) using fuzzy text (call_q21U06RpzgBZDkWKvvmnW8g3), which is a review headline rather than the book title, instead of mapping purchase_id to book_id, causing many correct books to be missed.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
